programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.desc: On the last day of World War II, Scottish soldier Lachlan MacLachlan is shot in the lower back and needs to be treated at the local medical unit in Burma before he can return home. His stay is lengthened, however, and when his nurse asks why, she learns that his wound is fatal. With the help of an American patient, the staff and other patients at the hospital try to make the Scot's final days happy. But things get ugly when he learns the truth.

programme.title: The Desert Horseman
programme.desc: The Durango Kid (Charles Starrett) and his sidekick (Smiley Burnette) catch up to payroll robbers.

programme.title: Shoot-Out at Medicine Bend
programme.desc: Just discharged from service, Capt. Devlin (Randolph Scott) and his cavalry pals Maitland (James Garner) and Clegg (Gordon Jones) travel to Devlin's brother's home, but arrive to see the place overrun by American Indians. Devlin's sibling is killed because of his shoddy ammo, so the captain and his friends decide to hunt down the man who sold the bum bullets. They ride into town and find that the culprit is Clark (James Craig), a rich businessman who has the law in his pocket.

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: Soon after the end of the Civil War, Blayde Hollister, a former Confederate officer, is a fugitive from the law. He fakes his own death in order to avoid arrest and to lull his enemies into a false sense of security. It turns out Hollister is gunning for the brothers who murdered his family during the war. Joining up with the newly arrived Marshal Martin Weatherby, Hollister heads for Dallas, where his targets are terrorizing the population with a crime spree.

programme.title: Gunfighters
programme.desc: In Texas, gunfighter Brazos Kane (Randolph Scott) decides to lay down his guns for good and rides out to visit his best friend -- only to witness his murder. When Brazos takes the body to the nearby ranch of the powerful Banner (Griff Barnett), the rancher accuses him of the murder. Brazos leaves Banner's daughter, Bess (Barbara Britton), a vital piece of evidence in the crime, and then must evade Banner and a crooked sheriff as he reluctantly takes up arms to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Ball of Fire
programme.desc: Hoping to update his chapter on modern slang, encyclopedia writer Professor Bertram Potts (Gary Cooper) ventures into a chic nightclub. Inside, he meets the snarky burlesque performer "Sugarpuss" O'Shea (Barbara Stanwyck). Fascinated by her command of popular jargon, Potts invites her to stay with him. But, unknown to Potts, she is the fiancée of a mobster (Dana Andrews) and wanted by the police. In the ensuing mayhem, Potts must stay on his toes or be swallowed up by bigger fish.

programme.title: Forbidden Planet
programme.desc: In this sci-fi classic, a spacecraft travels to the distant planet Altair IV to discover the fate of a group of scientists sent there decades earlier. When Commander John J. Adams and his crew arrive, they discover only two people: Dr. Morbius and his daughter, Altaira, who was born on the remote planet. Soon, Adams begins to uncover the mystery of what happened on Altair IV, and why Morbius and Altaira are the sole survivors.

programme.title: Utopia
programme.desc: In London to claim an inheritance, Stan (Stan Laurel) misses out on the money but instead receives his own island. Accompanied, as always, by his pal Ollie (Oliver Hardy), Stan travels to his new property, but gets caught in a storm and washes up on a newly formed atoll. When the boys learn the island is brimming with precious uranium, they form a constitution and declare themselves a sovereign state, while the great nations of the world look to get their own hands on the valuable territory.

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The vicar of Amberley village asks Holmes to look into several deaths that have taken place since the arrival of a man said to be descended from vampires; though the village is gripped by fear, Holmes is convinced there is a rational explanation.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bandit Queen
programme.desc: A young woman (Barbara Britton) becomes a masked avenger after gold-grabbers kill her Spanish parents in old California.

programme.title: The Hard Man

programme.title: Sergeant Rutledge
programme.desc: At a U.S. Army fort in the Arizona Territory in 1881, an officer is murdered, and his beautiful young daughter is beaten, raped and strangled. Army lawyer Tom Cantrell (Jeffrey Hunter) defends the accused, African-American sergeant Braxton Rutledge (Woody Strode), a soldier who had once been under his command. Under questioning by Cantrell and the prosecutor (Carleton Young), multiple witnesses piece together the truth of what happened at the fort that day.

programme.title: First Men in the Moon
programme.desc: Around the turn of the 20th century, Joseph Cavor (Lionel Jeffries), a brilliant British scientist, creates his own spacecraft and takes a trip to the moon, accompanied by explorers Arnold Bedford (Edward Judd) and Kate Callender (Martha Hyer). After landing, they encounter an insect-like alien race that lives under the moon's surface, which has an air-like atmosphere. After glimpsing the extraterrestrial society, the group must soon escape back to Earth.

programme.title: When Worlds Collide

Meanwhile, Hendron's daughter, Joyce (Barbara Rush), has grown fond of pilot David Randall (Richard Derr), and pleads to have him brought along as a small group is relocated to Zyra to avoid the impending mass destruction.

programme.title: 7th Cavalry
programme.desc: Returning to Fort Lincoln, Capt. Benson learns of Custer's defeat at the Little Big Horn. At the inquiry as Custer's officers blame Custer for the defeat, Benson tries to defend him. However, Benson was suspiciously absent at the time of the battle and is now despised by the troops. So when an order to retrieve the bodies from the battlefield arrives, Benson volunteers for the dangerous mission of returning into Indian territory.

programme.title: The Howards of Virginia
programme.desc: When his impoverished past is uncovered, Matt Howard is promptly fired by the Peytons, a wealthy family in Williamsburg during the Revolutionary War era. Undeterred, Matt returns to court the family's daughter, Jane, and the two marry and raise a family in the Virginia backwoods, infuriating the Peytons. The birth of a crippled son results in years of tension between Matt and Jane, and, when Matt decides to join the army, Jane makes a stunning decision.

The nation's fathers harmonize their way through the founding of America in this musical adapted from a popular Broadway show. programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: Dr. Allen Seward (Robert Francis) is the new doctor at a remote Army outpost. His liberal attitudes towards Native Americans become a source of tension between him and his superiors, especially Capt. Peter Blake (Philip Carey), who regards all Native Americans as dangerous and untrustworthy. Seward's insistence on treating several local Kiowa tribespeople for malaria further enrages Blake, who deems Seward a traitor when the Kiowa join forces with the Comanches and attack the fort.

programme.desc: An ex-convict and his partner eye an armored stagecoach full of gold fitted with a Gatling gun for protection.

programme.title: Heaven With a Gun
programme.desc: Jim Killian arrives in a small Arizona town hoping to establish a peaceful life as the local preacher, but he soon finds himself in the middle of a feud between sheep ranchers and cattlemen. Leloopa, a young Native American woman, pleads for Killian's help after her shepherd father is hanged by Coke Beck, the vicious son of the head cattle rancher. Killian must weigh his actions carefully lest he perpetuate the cycle of retribution and revenge.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: Git Along, Little Dogies
programme.desc: To protect his land from the possibility of pollution, ranch owner Gene Autry (Gene Autry) sides with fellow ranchers who are fighting the plans of banker Maxwell (William Farnum), who wants to drill oil wells. But when Gene realizes the discovery of oil would bring a railroad to the area and create much-needed jobs, he switches sides. Conniving local businessman George Wilkins (Weldon Heyburn) turns investors against Gene and Maxwell, however, hoping to slip in and take over the oil business.

programme.title: Jesse James at Bay
programme.desc: When a railroad company cheats Missouri farmers out of their land, Sheriff Whittaker (George "Gabby" Hayes) alerts his friend, kindhearted outlaw Jesse James (Roy Rogers), about their problem. As Jesse comes out of retirement to help the farmers, his evil look-alike, Clint Burns (also Rogers), appears in town to create havoc. Reporters Polly (Sally Payne) and Jane (Gale Storm) pressure the sheriff and railroad manager Phineas Krager (Pierre Watkin) about the increasingly tense situation.

programme.desc: Cobb and the infamous hartebeest.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Deep in the cornfields of Nebraska, Scott joins in on a family tradition going back generations: turtle hunting. With claws that shred, and an unrelenting bite, Snapping Turtles are not to be taken lightly.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: HUNTER® is an exciting new series being produced by Hunter Brand Media and hosted by Dave Poteat, that explores the different ways people use their natural hunter element. The first season is rooted in good ole North American big game hunting which is where Host, Dave Poteat's roots run the deepest. But as the series grows in the years to come, we will venture out from the comforts of the Whitetail woods from time to time to see how others act on their Hunter Element.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Celebrating Winchester Ammo and The USA.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Come along as we look back at the short-lived US service of the Krag Jorgensen. Used briefly in the Spanish-American War by Teddy Roosevelt's Rough Riders, it quickly became obsolete in the ever-changing landscape of firearms development.

programme.title: The Trail
programme.desc: Modern day mountain man Laramy Miller sets out on the trail to experience life in the high lonesome.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Veteran hunter Mike Hanback travels to all corners of North America in search of big, mature bucks. Viewers can expect heart-pounding action on every fair-chase hunt. And you'll learn a lot from Mike's insight into big bucks and the advanced tactics he uses to hunt them. The show focuses primarily on hunting whitetail deer, with a couple of hunts for giant mule deer each season. But BIG DEER TV is not all about big racks.

programme.title: Bowhunter TV
programme.desc: Danny Farris joins Curt Wells on the open plains of Colorado for a challenging pronghorn hunt. With little cover and sharp eyes everywhere, Danny makes a careful stalk right up to a buck to take the shot.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Batten Down October.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Deep in the cornfields of Nebraska, Scott joins in on a family tradition going back generations: turtle hunting. With claws that shred, and an unrelenting bite, Snapping Turtles are not to be taken lightly.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote, beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Clay Newcomb visit Jordan Budd for a guided Nebraska whitetail trip.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Winchester Deadly Passion is a show that will keep the viewer on the edge of their seat with hardcore style hunting mixed with Melissa's genuine and fun-loving personality.

programme.title: Hoge Wild
programme.desc: Hoge Wild is an exhilarating adventure TV series that follows the charismatic country music artist and host, Lucas Hoge, as he embarks on thrilling escapades around the world. With a passion for music, hunting, fishing, and scuba diving, Lucas Hoge brings a unique blend of talents to the screen. Viewers are taken on a wild ride as Lucas explores diverse landscapes, from rugged mountains to crystal-clear waters, showcasing his love for the great outdoors.

programme.title: The Hunter's Quest
programme.desc: Hunter and his good buddy, Casey Richmond from Eberlestock, get dropped by bush plane into the Alaskan wilderness on the caribou hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Western Hunter
programme.desc: The Western Hunter documents the journeys of public land hunters out West. The stories unfold in some of the most wild and beautiful settings on the continent in pursuit of big game.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the gray light; these moments are what make up the beauty of the wild. This series is not about anyone in particular, but rather what we as hunters enjoy the most.

programme.title: Into High Country
programme.desc: Into High Country seeks to capture the most compelling and wide array of authentic hunting adventures from the most epic landscapes the Western U.S. and North America have to offer. Featured is a wide array of bow and rifle hunts for big game such as elk, mule deer, black bear, moose, pronghorn, and many more incredible and fascinating wild animal species.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Shock Therapy
programme.desc: Jim's Top Guide - 2025 Yukon Recap - Part 2.

programme.title: Greg McHale's Wild Yukon
programme.desc: Greg and Kolter head into the high country late in the season, hoping to find a ram before winter fully sets in. The conditions are tough and time is short, but the experience is about more than just the outcome.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote, beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table.

programme.title: The Western Hunter

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Award-Winning Heartland Waterfowl is a team of men from the Midwest that travels across the US and Canada to film honest waterfowl hunting experiences. With a variety of personalities, these hunting buddies pursue waterfowl hunting with hard work and a dedication to scouting, while showcasing their efforts with the highest standard of production quality.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Ducks Unlimited Television - America's original and longest-running waterfowl series - brings the audience exciting waterfowl hunting action from around North America every season. DUTV is co-produced by MOOSE Media. The series' current stable of on-air personalities includes Doug Larsen, Fred Zink, Colin Mulligan, Betsy Newbill, Dr. Karen Waldrop, Mike Stewart and Phil Bourjaily. With support from Drake Waterfowl Systems, Browning, Higdon, Purina, Tetra and Mossy Oak.

programme.title: Whitetail Fix
programme.desc: A team of God-loving individuals, from different walks of life, different backgrounds, and different jobs that all share one common bond: The passion and desire to achieve their Whitetail Fix!

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors

programme.title: The Wild Outdoors
programme.desc: Come along with Jay and Wyatt Gregory as they share The Wild Outdoors!!! A bowhunting series in its 32nd year has something for everyone!!! The Wild Outdoors spotlights fair chase bowhunting across this great country, chasing everything from elk and antelope to turkeys and bear, with an emphasis on big mature whitetails in the Midwest!! Jay, Wyatt and the staff will take you along on hunts just the way they happen, from start to finish!!

programme.desc: Mike and Georgia Kate head to the Rocky Mountains of Colorado as they archery hunt mule deer.

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Veteran hunter Mike Hanback travels to all corners of North America in search of big, mature bucks. Viewers can expect heart-pounding action on every fair-chase hunt. And you'll learn a lot from Mike's insight into big bucks and the advanced tactics he uses to hunt them. The show focuses primarily on hunting whitetail deer, with a couple of hunts for giant mule deer each season. But BIG DEER TV is not all about big racks.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Chef and the crew continue their journey in Louisiana to cook blue crabs and hunt early teal season.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Outdoor sporting and recreational events for everyone.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Savage Arms has made firearms in America since the 19th century.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Whitetail Properties takes you on exciting hunts across the whitetail's range while providing land management tips and representing buyers and sellers of hunting, farm, ranch, timber, country homes and auctions across the country.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In an iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs onto his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth; constructing a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if a person can hit, and explode, the tank.

programme.title: Handguns
programme.desc: Micro compact pistols are easy to carry, but they can be more difficult to shoot well.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather harvests a seal during the herring spawn to make seal oil and to share traditional foods with her community.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Award-Winning Heartland Waterfowl is a team of men from the Midwest that travels across the US and Canada to film honest waterfowl hunting experiences. With a variety of personalities, these hunting buddies pursue waterfowl hunting with hard work and a dedication to scouting, while showcasing their efforts with the highest standard of production quality.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: In the outback of Australia where everything is trying to kill you. It's monsoon season when no one attempts to roam around with salt water crocodiles lurking. Mario links up with a long time friend in search of a wild Buffalo.

programme.title: Whitetail Fix
programme.desc: A team of God-loving individuals, from different walks of life, different backgrounds, and different jobs that all share one common bond: The passion and desire to achieve their Whitetail Fix!

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond wild pigs.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Jean-Paul Bourgeois visit Ronnie Collins in Louisiana for some backwater duck hunting.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Karl Malcolm explore the Gila Wilderness while hunting for wild turkeys.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: The team is back in the Yukon getting camp set up. Included is the challenging task of transporting the ARGO UTVs from one place to another.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR Xfinity Series driver Jeb Burton takes fans beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where high-speed racing meets the great outdoors. Join Jeb and his family as they embark on thrilling hunting and fishing adventures, all while championing conservation and land management. From the fast-paced world of NASCAR to the peace of nature, this series offers an exciting glimpse into Jeb's passions both on and off the track.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: New Zealand is a hunters paradise and the boys from Savage Outdoors are there to find everything it has to offer.

programme.title: Huntworx
programme.desc: HuntWorx is a new show based around the ideology of the three major principles that aid in consistently harvesting mature animals. This plan, prep and pursue model has stood the test of time and continues to pay dividends for our cast year in and year out. With a combined over 100 years of dedicated hunting experience, Greg Glesinger, Kasey Morgan, Matt Dye, Adam Keith, and Max Mongrello wish to not only showcase their incredible outdoor adventures.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Tyler Weaver & Kenneth Lancaster return to the Brooks Range of Alaska, on a DIY caribou hunt.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: For over 20 years Michael Lee and Kevin Knighton have been blessed to bring the Backwoods Life hunting show and outdoor television into the homes of loyal viewers each week. The guys work hard to bring their lives, personalities, and experiences to the show while demonstrating what the average person goes through each year trying to fill tags and their freezers.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Small Town Hunting is a show inspired by you, the viewer. The lifestyle throughout small towns everywhere has always been the roots of the hunting culture. Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style that we call Small Town Hunting. After all, wherever you call home, there is a little small town in all of us.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Ducks Unlimited Television - America's original and longest-running waterfowl series - brings the audience exciting waterfowl hunting action from around North America every season. DUTV is co-produced by MOOSE Media. The series' current stable of on-air personalities includes Doug Larsen, Fred Zink, Colin Mulligan, Betsy Newbill, Dr. Karen Waldrop, Mike Stewart and Phil Bourjaily. With support from Drake Waterfowl Systems, Browning, Higdon, Purina, Tetra and Mossy Oak.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Deep in the cornfields of Nebraska, Scott joins in on a family tradition going back generations: turtle hunting. With claws that shred, and an unrelenting bite, Snapping Turtles are not to be taken lightly.

programme.title: WildFed
programme.desc: Daniel goes turkey hunting and learns the traditions of foraging fiddleheads and leeks with Avani, Arthur and Sara.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Andrew Upshaw takes on offshore saltwater fishing in Gulf Shores, Alabama, continuing the #4 series with commercial Shark Fishing.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: There's buried treasure along the Washington coastline and fishmonger Tommy Gomes is on the hunt.

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Sparky, AKA THE JOKER from Jokers Wild Outdoors, takes friends, family and clients hunting all over the world and on M2D CAMO Properties for wild exciting adventures.

programme.title: Dirt Trax Television
programme.desc: Dirt Trax TV is the trusted source North American ATV and UTV enthusiasts turn to for Test Ride reviews of today's most popular off-road vehicles; fans of Dirt Trax TV are also treated to detailed in-shop technical mods and maintenance features along with travel guides showcasing popular off-road destinations.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR Xfinity Series driver Jeb Burton takes fans beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where high-speed racing meets the great outdoors. Join Jeb and his family as they embark on thrilling hunting and fishing adventures, all while championing conservation and land management. From the fast-paced world of NASCAR to the peace of nature, this series offers an exciting glimpse into Jeb's passions both on and off the track.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the gray light; these moments are what make up the beauty of the wild. This series is not about anyone in particular, but rather what we as hunters enjoy the most.

programme.title: Chasing the 29
programme.desc: Join youth hunter Chase Anthony on an exhilarating journey in Chasing the 29. Follow Chase as he pursues the prestigious North American 29, a monumental challenge to hunt 29 big game species across the continent. Also featured on this show are adventures from his Dangerous 7, a daring quest to hunt seven of Africa's most formidable animals. Packed with heart-pounding moments and stunning landscapes, this series showcases Chase's determination, passion, and respect for the wild.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In Hawaii, King teams up with friends Michael Tracy, JJ, and Nick, embarking on a Kona Island expedition for rams, goats, and sheep.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Come along as we look back at the short-lived US service of the Krag Jorgensen. Used briefly in the Spanish-American War by Teddy Roosevelt's Rough Riders, it quickly became obsolete in the ever-changing landscape of firearms development.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV

programme.title: Stompin' groundz

Family.

programme.desc: Whitetail Properties takes you on exciting hunts across the whitetail's range while providing land management tips and representing buyers and sellers of hunting, farm, ranch, timber, country homes and auctions across the country.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In Hawaii, King teams up with friends Michael Tracy, JJ, and Nick, embarking on a Kona Island expedition for rams, goats, and sheep.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR Xfinity Series driver Jeb Burton takes fans beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where high-speed racing meets the great outdoors. Join Jeb and his family as they embark on thrilling hunting and fishing adventures, all while championing conservation and land management. From the fast-paced world of NASCAR to the peace of nature, this series offers an exciting glimpse into Jeb's passions both on and off the track.

programme.title: RNT-V
programme.desc: RNT-V is based around the RNT Call Shop in Stuttgart, Arkansas--from chasing ducks and geese over fine retrievers in different parts of the country to uncovering the history of an old time call maker. Hosted by World Champions who are all about the hunt!

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the gray light; these moments are what make up the beauty of the wild. This series is not about anyone in particular, but rather what we as hunters enjoy the most.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: HUNTER® is an exciting new series being produced by Hunter Brand Media and hosted by Dave Poteat, that explores the different ways people use their natural hunter element. The first season is rooted in good ole North American big game hunting which is where Host, Dave Poteat's roots run the deepest. But as the series grows in the years to come, we will venture out from the comforts of the Whitetail woods from time to time to see how others act on their Hunter Element.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond wild pigs.

programme.title: Elk Camp
programme.desc: Renowned elk caller and professional guide Steve Chappell guides his clients on up close, bugling elk hunts in Arizona and Colorado. Steve's calling skills and capacity for understanding elk behavior are on display each week.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Outdoor sporting and recreational events for everyone.

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Veteran hunter Mike Hanback travels to all corners of North America in search of big, mature bucks. Viewers can expect heart-pounding action on every fair-chase hunt. And you'll learn a lot from Mike's insight into big bucks and the advanced tactics he uses to hunt them. The show focuses primarily on hunting whitetail deer, with a couple of hunts for giant mule deer each season. But BIG DEER TV is not all about big racks.

programme.title: Hoge Wild
programme.desc: Hoge Wild is an exhilarating adventure TV series that follows the charismatic country music artist and host, Lucas Hoge, as he embarks on thrilling escapades around the world. With a passion for music, hunting, fishing, and scuba diving, Lucas Hoge brings a unique blend of talents to the screen. Viewers are taken on a wild ride as Lucas explores diverse landscapes, from rugged mountains to crystal-clear waters, showcasing his love for the great outdoors.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Winchester Deadly Passion is a show that will keep the viewer on the edge of their seat with hardcore style hunting mixed with Melissa's genuine and fun-loving personality.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Andrew Upshaw takes on offshore saltwater fishing in Gulf Shores, Alabama, continuing the #4 series with commercial Shark Fishing.

programme.title: MOJO TV

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather harvests a seal during the herring spawn to make seal oil and to share traditional foods with her community.

programme.title: Backwoods Life

The guys work hard to bring their lives, personalities, and experiences to the show while demonstrating what the average person goes through each year trying to fill tags and their freezers.

programme.title: Adrenaline

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Part 2 of a nighttime patrol to stop anglers from keeping fish that are foul-hooked.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Come along as we look back at the short-lived US service of the Krag Jorgensen. Used briefly in the Spanish-American War by Teddy Roosevelt's Rough Riders, it quickly became obsolete in the ever-changing landscape of firearms development.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S04 E10 Willie Kennard Makes His Mark in History Under siege by gunslingers, the gold mining town of Yankee Hill runs a newspaper advertisement to find a new marshal; former slave and Union soldier Willie Kennard answers the ad, but he faces prejudice and doubt as he works to restore law and order.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S04 E11 John Wesley Hardin: Killer on the Texas Frontier When outlaw John Wesley Hardin murders a sheriff, a hard-charging Texas Ranger joins forces with a cool-headed police detective to hunt the killer; the unlikely duo must learn how to work together to end Hardin's criminal career once and for all.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S03 E01 Anne Bailey: Horseback Heroine After Anne Bailey's husband is killed by Native Americans, she defies the social norms of the frontier and becomes a horseback courier, risking her life to race through hostile territory delivering vital supplies to isolated forts and settlements.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E07 Molly's Choice A young Jim Bridger helps a Shoshone woman escape the clutches of her abusive husband; as Bridger squares off against the frontier ruffian and his henchmen, he soon realizes that the woman he is helping is none other than the legendary Sacagawea.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E08 The Snakeroot Cure When a young girl is bitten by a rattlesnake, mountain man Jim Bridger finds himself in a race against time to save her arm and keep her alive as he desperately searches the wilderness for a medicinal plant that once saved the life of his friend.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S03 E14 The Goose-Drowner Bart and Jack Darby sit out a torrential rain with four killers and a beautiful girl.

programme.title: Jubal
programme.desc: (1956) Western with Glenn Ford, Ernest Borgnine, Rod Steiger and Valerie French. A cowboy is given a job by a rancher, sparking lethal jealousy in a colleague and desire in the boss's wife.

programme.title: Entrapment
programme.desc: (1999) Action thriller starring Sean Connery as Robert 'Mac' MacDougal, one of the world's finest art thieves, and Catherine Zeta-Jones as the insurance company agent out to trap him.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

programme.title: BlackBerry
programme.desc: (2023) Matt Johnson, Glenn Howerton and Jay Baruchel star in the frenetic, flabbergasting and mostly true story of the precipitous rise and fall of the once ubiquitous device.

programme.title: Walking and Talking
programme.desc: (1996) Comedy with Catherine Keener and Anne Heche. A successful woman's best friend is getting married - making her feel unlucky in love. But is everything as rosy as it at first seems?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Tall Men
programme.desc: (1955) Western. Clark Gable plays a Civil War veteran who, with his brother (Cameron Mitchell), accepts the role of trail boss on a huge cattle drive for a crooked cattleman (Robert Ryan).

programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: (1954) Tough western. A cavalry doctor (Robert Francis) discovers a Native American tribe is dying of malaria, but his by-the-book captain (Phil Carey) refuses to allow their treatment.

programme.title: The Sheriff of Fractured Jaw
programme.desc: (1959) Comedy western with Kenneth More. An English gunsmith decides the Wild West is the best market for his wares, but little does he expect to end up sheriff of a lawless frontier town.

programme.title: Earth vs the Flying Saucers
programme.desc: (1956) Sci-fi thriller. Hugh Marlowe stars as a scientist who discovers Earth is threatened by a fleet of flying saucers bent on global conquest. With special effects by Ray Harryhausen.

programme.title: Fisherman's Friends
programme.desc: (2019) Heart-warming comedy based on the real-life story of the Cornish folk ensemble who took the UK charts by storm in 2010, starring Daniel Mays and Tuppence Middleton.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: (2018) Action crime thriller sequel. Denzel Washington returns as Robert McCall, who's out for revenge after ruthless killers murder an agency contact who he also considered a friend.

programme.title: Let Him Go
programme.desc: (2020) Neo-western with Kevin Costner. After losing their only son, a retired sheriff and his wife try to save their former daughter-in-law from her abusive partner.

programme.title: Never Grow Old
programme.desc: (2019) Gritty revisionist western with Emile Hirsch as an undertaker who's somewhat conflicted when an outlaw played by John Cusack starts dropping bodies in a previously God-fearing town.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Heiress
programme.desc: (1949) Oscar-winner Olivia de Havilland is joined by Montgomery Clift and Ralph Richardson in William Wyler's dark psychological romance, adapted from Henry James's novel Washington Square.

programme.title: Patton
programme.desc: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

programme.title: Mysterious Island
programme.desc: (1961) Sci-fi adventure based on Jules Verne's novel. Two men fleeing the US Civil War find an island inhabited by monsters (animated by Ray Harryhausen) and the mysterious Captain Nemo.

programme.title: The Eagle
programme.desc: (2010) Historical adventure with Channing Tatum and Jamie Bell. A Roman commander and his British slave embark on a risky mission to recover a military mascot lost in Scotland.

programme.title: The Equalizer 3
programme.desc: (2023) It's a Robert McCall recall as Denzel Washington tackles the mob in Italy for the 'final chapter' of the ultra-violent vigilante action franchise. Fatti sotto! Antoine Fuqua directs.

programme.title: Red Rooms
programme.desc: (2023) Dark dark-web horror starring Juliette Gariépy as a model who obsessively attends the trial of an alleged serial killer who committed his crimes live online in a so-called Red Room.

programme.title: The Innocents
programme.desc: (1961) Classic chiller with Deborah Kerr. A governess finds her two charges worryingly worldly. Are they possessed by spirits? Or is it all in her head? Based on Henry James's story.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Jubal
programme.desc: (1956) Western with Glenn Ford, Ernest Borgnine, Rod Steiger and Valerie French. A cowboy is given a job by a rancher, sparking lethal jealousy in a colleague and desire in the boss's wife.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: (1957) Classic western with Glenn Ford and Van Heflin. The capture of a murderous stagecoach robber propels an impoverished local rancher on a perilous journey. Directed by Delmer Daves.

programme.title: Winchester '73
programme.desc: (1950) Western. James Stewart stars as sharpshooter Lin McAdam, who wins a Winchester rifle. But a murderous rival steals his prize, so McAdam sets out on an epic journey in pursuit.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: (1950) Western starring James Stewart. A gold prospector, tired of reprisal killings between whites and Native Americans, offers a truce to the Apaches' leader. But tensions resurface.

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: (2004) Tense sci-fi thriller starring Dennis Quaid and Jake Gyllenhaal. Can a scientist save his son from a sudden climatic catastrophe?

programme.title: Transporter 3
programme.desc: (2008) Violent action-thriller with Jason Statham. Terrorists hire a courier to drive a kidnapped woman across Europe, on a journey that gets ever more dangerous.

programme.title: The Artifice Girl
programme.desc: (2022) Franklin Ritch's strikingly claustrophobic AI thriller. A man creates a virtual nine-year-old to lure online predators from the shadows. But as she learns, she becomes more real...

programme.title: Shayda
programme.desc: (2023) Noora Nisari's poignant drama with Zar Amir Ebrahimi as an Australian-Iranian woman fighting to start afresh with her daughter after fleeing an abusive marriage in 1990s Melbourne.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Leave Her to Heaven
programme.desc: (1945) Riveting film noir melodrama starring Oscar-nominated Gene Tierney as an irredeemably evil, possessive woman who resorts to murder to keep her husband (Cornel Wilde) with her.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: (1966) Bing Crosby and Ann-Margret star in this remake of John Ford's classic western. A group of disparate strangers are thrown together while travelling through dangerous territory.

programme.title: The Long Ships
programme.desc: (1964) Adventure with Richard Widmark as a Viking who leads his men on the quest for a huge bell made of solid gold, but with Sidney Poitier, leader of an army of Moors, on the trail too.

programme.title: Independence Day
programme.desc: (1996) Blockbusting landmark sci-fi action-thriller starring Will Smith and Jeff Goldblum. A US Air Force pilot and a scientist battle aliens who are spectacularly destroying our planet.

programme.title: Plane
programme.desc: (2023) Action thriller starring Gerard Butler as an airline pilot who becomes a one-man army after crash landing on an island overrun by bad guys. To survive, he's gonna have to wing it.

programme.title: Assassin Club
programme.desc: (2023) Action with Henry Golding and Sam Neill. An assassin wants to retire for love, but his handler has entered him into a deadly game of hit the hitman. Can he survive to live his dream?

programme.title: Death to Smoochy
programme.desc: (2002) Danny DeVito's dark comedy stars Robin Williams as a corrupt TV clown who, when sacked for taking bribes, swears vengeance on his replacement. Co-starring Edward Norton.

programme.desc: Former "Shadetree Mechanic" and "Two Guys Garage" host Sam Memmolo, a pioneer in automotive how-to TV, is back turning wrenches and tightening bolts on "Sam's Garage." programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: In this week's show, we explore the complex issue of tribalism. We travel to Kenya to meet a couple whose love defies societal norms. In our Street Debate, we hear from Nigerian youths who are breaking free from tribalism.

programme.title: The Sacred Cows of the Mafia
programme.desc: In the southern Italian region of Calabria, in the municipality of Cittanova, hundreds of feral cattle are causing trouble. They're eating crops and causing accidents. The problem is a relic of the great Mafia wars and a legacy of the 'Ndrangheta clan.

programme.desc: Featuring analysis from experts and interviews with aspiring entrepreneurs, Made in Germany explores the diverse business sector in Germany, revealing how Europe's strongest economy affects business across the world. The team of determined reporters travel across Germany and Europe to meet individuals driving the economy and changing the way we work.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). programme.title: Euromaxx
programme.desc: Weekly lifestyle show on DW presents Europe at its best, starting from culture news to entertainment events, beautiful views of natural scenery and most fascinating modern art pieces. Enjoy Europe in its diversity, its absorbing insights and amazing lifestyle. Explore its best restaurants with most sophisticated cuisine, and hundreds of extraordinary topics and captivating stories. Euromaxx is produced in German, English, Spanish and Arabic. Join and learn all about extraordinary European traditions.

programme.title: Arts Unveiled
programme.desc: Arts Unveiled dives deep into the international creative scene, uncovering new ideas and explaining cultural phenomena that shape our history, present and future. Who are the artists? What are their greatest works of art? And how are they having an impact? Where can we find their exciting projects?

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

programme.title: Sports Life
programme.desc: Donjeta Sadiku is a supremely talented boxer with multiple titles to her name. But there is a problem: Donjeta comes from Kosovo, a state whose sovereignty many other countries refuse to recognize. That means she can't compete everywhere, which is impacting her international career. Donjeta doesn't only face opposition in the ring, but also outside of it due to politics.

programme.title: Tomorrow Today
programme.desc: Science show on DW provides its viewers a weekly dose of useful scientific information regarding various areas. If you are into cosmos and universe, then this show is made for you. Find out if it is possible to predict solar storms, whether plants are smart, if synthetic fuels can help protect environment, what are the results of the largest-ever polar expedition, and many more questions in different spheres of life.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: IKEA Loves Wood
programme.desc: IKEA is one of the world's largest consumers of wood. Almost 15 million cubic meters of the material are used every year in cheap IKEA products - with millions of trees felled for the mass production machine.

programme.title: DW News Focus
programme.desc: Espacio de Deutsche Welle que ofrece una selección de los mejores documentales y reportajes de actualidad sobre los acontecimientos más importantes del mundo político, empresarial, económico, deportivo o científico, entre muchos otros.

programme.title: Reporter: On Location
programme.desc: It is all about dedicated reporters who are at the top table of world affairs and provide on-the-spot commentary from different parts of Germany, Europe and around the globe. On-the-ground reporters are always close to the action, and cover international events or curious facts of daily life. With their camera on, they are always ready to inform the viewers about top events and key stories in various spheres of life.
